name: com.wayngamesassets.mgm.charactercontroller
title: MGM Character Controller
description:
The MGM Character Controller provides a modular, ECS-based architecture for implementing character locomotion in Unity using state-driven logic. 
It cleanly separates gameplay entities - Players, Characters, and Models - and handles input, movement, and visual synchronization in a scalable and maintainable way.
It integrates seamlessly with Unity's New Input System and Cinemachine, but remains flexible enough to support custom input or camera solutions. And it provides powerful debug visualization to make test new behavior simpler
author: WAYN Games
